chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.821 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case ------------------------- 13.02.2026 Mr. Moula Bux Bhutto, advocate for applicants Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, D.P.G. ------------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant submits that learned Judicial Magistrate-X, Malir, Karachi had acquitted the applicants/accused of the charge, vide Order dated 06.10.2025 under Section 249-A, Cr.PC passed in Criminal Case No.10/2025, arising out of FIR No.1911/2024, registered at P.S. Sachal for offence under sections 392, 34, PPC as such he does not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application. In view of such statement, the instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
